actors.name: Donald Trump
actors.role: Former President of the United States, 2024 Republican Presidential Candidate
actors.blurb: Donald Trump remains the central figure in right-wing and far-right news cycles due to his ongoing influence in U.S. politics, his upcoming state visit to China, and his administration's policies on Iran, inflation, and domestic issues like the federal gas tax. His actions and statements continue to drive significant media attention and public debate.

actors.name: Javier Milei
actors.blurb: Javier Milei continues to generate significant coverage due to his controversial economic policies, including severe budget cuts to universities and public services, and his government's internal conflicts. His administration's actions have sparked nationwide protests and debates over his leadership style and effectiveness.

actors.name: Péter Magyar
actors.blurb: Péter Magyar has become a prominent figure following his party's landslide victory in Hungary's elections. His actions, including forming a new government and addressing corruption and economic issues, have driven significant media coverage. His leadership marks a shift from Viktor Orbán's long-standing rule.

actors.name: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD)
actors.blurb: The AfD continues to drive significant coverage due to its rising prominence in German polls, its controversial policies, and internal party dynamics. The party's stance on issues like immigration, energy policy, and its potential role in regional governments have kept it in the news cycle.
signals: Rising poll numbers and electoral success
